revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:出早雄命]]


{{Infobox deity
| image         = 諏訪大社_本宮摂社_出早社.JPG
| image_size    = 290px
| caption       = {{ill|Izuhayao Shrine|ja|出早社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505762|1=Izuhayao Shrine}} (a subordinate shrine of the {{ill|Suwa-taisha|en|Suwa-taisha|qid=Q218813|lt=Suwa-taisha|1=Suwa-taisha}} Upper Shrine Main Shrine)
| name          = Izuhayao no Mikoto
| type          = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}}
| full_name     = Izuhayao no Mikoto
| other_names   = Izuhaya no Kami, Izuhaya no Mikoto, Izusokuo no Mikoto, Izusokuo no Mikoto, etc.
| Rank          = {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}}
| nature        = God of pioneering, agriculture, and warts removal
| father        = {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|qid=Q9150391|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}
| mother        = {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|qid=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome no Kami|1=Yasakatome}}
| consort       ={{ill|Tamatsuru Hime|ja|多満留姫|1=Tamaru-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamatsuru Hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}}<small>(per {{ill|Moriyakeifu|ja|守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyakeifu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}})</small>; {{ill|Q56347882|qid=Q56347882|1=Tamaru-hime}}| offspring     ={{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Izuhaya-hime no Mikoto|ja|出早比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhaya-hime no Mikoto|qq=}}, {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagate no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagate no Sukune no Kami|qq=}}, etc.; {{ill|Q48753263|qid=Q48753263|1=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto}}; {{ill|Q56350355|qid=Q56350355|1=Aizu-hime-no-Kami}}; {{ill|Yagata Sukunegami|qid=Q56347860|1=Yagata no Sukune no Kami}}| shrines       = {{ill|Izuhayao Shrine|ja|出早社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505762|1=Izuhayao Shrine}} (a subordinate shrine of Suwa Taisha), {{ill|Izuhayao Koagi Shrine|ja|出早雄小萩神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao Koagi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505764|1=Izuhayao Koagi Shrine}}, etc.
| clans         = {{ill|Suwa clan|en|Suwa clan|qid=Q2975376|lt=Suwa clan|1=Suwa clan}} (including {{ill|Suwa Gōzoku|ja|諏訪神党|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Gōzoku|1=Suwa Shintō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11631917}} and {{ill|Suwa Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|ja|洲羽国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Kuni-no-Miyatsuko|1=Suwa-no-kokuzo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q67499361}}), {{ill|Hayade Clan|ja|早出氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayade Clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}

| image = 諏訪大社_本宮摂社_出早社.JPG
| image_size = 290px
| image_caption = Izuhaya Shrine (摂社 of {{ill|Suwa-taisha|en|Suwa-taisha|qid=Q218813|lt=Suwa-taisha|1=Suwa-taisha}})
| name = Izuhaya no Mikoto (出早雄命)
| deity = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}}
| full_name = Izuhaya no Mikoto (出早雄命)
| aliases = Izuhayao no Mikoto (伊豆早雄命), Izuhayao no Kami (伊豆速男神), Izuhaya no Kami (出早神)
| alternate_names = 
| Rank = {{ill|Shōgoi|ja|正五位|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}}
| divine_nature = God of pioneering, agriculture, and the removal of warts
| burial_place = Traditional sites exist
| father = {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|qid=Q9150391|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}
| mother = {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|qid=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome|1=Yasakatome}}
| spouse = {{ill|Tamaru-hime|ja|多満留姫|1=Tamaru-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}} <small>(per Moriya clan genealogy)</small>
| children = {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhaya-hime|ja|出早比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime|qq=}}, {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|qq=}}, etc.
| shrines = Izuhaya Shrine (摂社 of {{ill|Suwa-taisha|en|Suwa-taisha|qid=Q218813|lt=Suwa-taisha|1=Suwa-taisha}}), {{ill|Izuhayaohagi Shrine|ja|出早雄小萩神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayaohagi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505764|1=Izuhayao Koagi Shrine}}, etc.
| related_clans = {{ill|Suwa clan|en|Suwa clan|qid=Q2975376|lt=Suwa clan|1=Suwa clan}} ({{ill|Suwa Shrine Party|ja|諏訪神党|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine Party|1=Suwa Shintō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11631917}}, {{ill|Suwa Province|ja|洲羽国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Province|1=Suwa-no-kokuzo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q67499361}}), {{ill|Hayade Clan|ja|早出氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayade Clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
| gender = {{ill|male|qid=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}}
| parents = {{ill|Takeminakata|qid=Q9150391|1=Takeminakata}}
}}
'''Izuhayao no Mikoto''' (いずはやおのみこと, historically spelled いづはやをのみこと) is a {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}} deity venerated in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|qq=}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}.

'''Izuhaya no Mikoto''' (出早雄命, historical spelling: いづはやをのみこと) is a {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} venerated in the folk faiths of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}.

== Name ==
The deity's name appears in various forms, including '''Izuhaya no Kami''' (いずはやのかみ), '''Izuhaya no Mikoto''' (いずはやのみこと), '''Izusokuo no Mikoto''' (いずそくおのみこと), '''Izusokuo no Mikoto''' (いずそくおのみこと), and simply '''Izuhayao''' (いずはやお). Early records, such as the {{ill|Suwa Jinja Ryakuengi|ja|諏訪神社略縁起|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Jinja Ryakuengi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} compiled in 1902,<ref name="ryakuengi">{{Cite book|和書|title=諏訪神社略縁起|editor=守矢実久|publisher=中村甚之助|year=1902}}</ref> and medieval texts like the {{ill|Suwa Kamisha Monoimi Rei no Koto|ja|諏訪上社物忌令之事|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Kamisha Monoimi Rei no Koto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (1237 CE),<ref name="Takei">{{Cite journal|和書|author=Takei Masahiro|title=祭事を読む—諏訪上社物忌令之事—|journal=飯田市美術博物館研究紀要|volume=9|year=1999}}</ref> also describe the deity as '''Izuhaya''' or '''Izusoku'''.

The deity is also known by other names, such as '''Izuhayao no Kami''' (伊豆早雄命), '''Izuhaya no Kami''' (出早神), and '''Izuhayao no Mikoto''' (伊豆速男神). Historical texts like the {{ill|Suwa Kamisha Monogui Rei no Koto|ja|諏訪上社物忌令之事|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Kamisha Monogui Rei no Koto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (1237 CE) refer to him as '''Izudome Myōjin''' (出止明神).<ref name="Takei" />

== Overview ==
According to the {{ill|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|en|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|qid=Q1052981|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}, Izuhaya no Kami was granted {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位下|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 860 CE and was later promoted to {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位上|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} in 873 CE.<ref name="sandaijitsuroku">{{Cite web|title=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|url=http://www.j-texts.com/chuko/sandai.html|website=J-TEXTS|accessdate=2019-07-19}}</ref> He attained {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 878 CE.<ref name="ryakuengi" />

In the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}}, Izuhaya no Mikoto is considered a son of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|qid=Q9150391|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}. Local traditions regard him as the second son and a successor who governed the Suwa area.<ref>Miyasaka Kijū, ''Faith in Suwa Grand Shrine,'' 1938, p. 3.</ref>

== Overview ==
According to the {{ill|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|en|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|qid=Q1052981|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}, Izuhayao no Mikoto was granted successive titles: {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} in 860 CE, promoted to Senior Fifth Rank in 873 CE, and later recognized as a deity associated with the pioneering of the {{ill|Shinano Province|en|Shinano Province|qid=Q289250|lt=Shinano Province|1=Shinano Province}}.<ref name="sandaijituroku">{{Cite web|和書|title=日本三代実録|website=J-TEXTS}}</ref> In later tradition, he is described as the second son of Takeminakata no Kami and Yasakatome no Kami and credited with assisting in the development of agriculture and land reclamation in Suwa and surrounding regions.<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=諏訪大社の信仰|author=宮坂喜十|year=1938}}</ref>

The deity has also been associated with the {{ill|Mishaguji|en|Mishaguji|qid=Q11071209|lt=Mishaguji|1=Mishaguji}} cult, which venerated numerous guardian deities of Suwa's forests and lands. His connection to fertility, land protection, and healing (especially wart removal) has ensured continued worship at local shrines.<ref name="Moriyakeifu">{{Cite book|和書|title=神長守矢氏系譜|editor=諏訪教育会|year=1938}}</ref>

== Lineage ==
[[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|190px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage (from {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|qid=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami|1=Moreya}} to {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}).]]

The genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} describes Izuhaya no Mikoto as the spouse of {{ill|Tamaru-hime|ja|多満留姫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}}, daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|qid=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami|1=Moreya}}.<ref name="Moriyakeifu" /> He is generally regarded as the progenitor of the {{ill|Suwa clan|en|Suwa clan|qid=Q2975376|lt=Suwa clan|1=Suwa clan}}.<ref>Yonekawa Kazuhiko, ''Revised Suwa Genealogy,'' 1921.</ref>

Children attributed to Izuhaya no Mikoto include:<ref name="ryakuengi" />
* {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsugata no Sukune no Kami|qq=}}
* {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhaya-hime|ja|出早比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsuhaya-hime|qq=}}
* {{ill|Kusanoi-hime|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanoi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135493035|1=Kusanoi-hime}}
* {{ill|Kameba no Kami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kameba no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135493216|1=Kamoha no Kami}}
* {{ill|Wakagi-hime|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakagi-hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135492776|1=Wakakihime-no-Kami}}

== Lineage ==
The deity's lineage is detailed in {{ill|Moriyakeifu|ja|守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyakeifu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Izuhayao no Mikoto is married to {{ill|Tamatsuru Hime|ja|多満留姫|1=Tamaru-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamatsuru Hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}}, and their children include:
* {{ill|Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagata no Sukune no Kami|lt=Yagate no Sukune no Kami|ja|八縣宿禰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagate no Sukune no Kami|qq=}} (also known as {{ill|Arrows of the Field|ja|箭津安賀多神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arrows of the Field|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}})
* {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Izuhaya-hime no Mikoto|ja|伊津早姫神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhaya-hime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Kamoha no Kami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamoha no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135493216|1=Kamoha no Kami}}
* {{ill|Wakaki-hime no Kami|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakaki-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135492776|1=Wakakihime-no-Kami}}
These descendants are linked to the {{ill|Suwa clan|en|Suwa clan|qid=Q2975376|lt=Suwa clan|1=Suwa clan}} and other prominent local lineages.<ref name="suwasikeizu">{{Cite book|和書|title=諏訪氏系図 正編|editor=延川和彦|year=1921}}</ref>

== Shrines ==
Izuhayao no Mikoto is enshrined in numerous locations:
* '''{{ill|Izuhayao Shrine|ja|出早社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505762|1=Izuhayao Shrine}}''' - A subordinate shrine of {{ill|Suwa-taisha|en|Suwa-taisha|qid=Q218813|lt=Suwa-taisha|1=Suwa-taisha}}, this is the primary location for worship.
* '''{{ill|Izuhayao Koagi Shrine|ja|出早雄小萩神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao Koagi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505764|1=Izuhayao Koagi Shrine}}''' - Located in {{ill|Okaya, Nagano|en|Okaya, Nagano|qid=Q838672|lt=Okaya|1=Okaya, Nagano}}, this shrine combines the traditions of multiple local shrines.
* '''{{ill|Izuhayao Shrine (Ueda)|ja|出早雄神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao Shrine (Ueda)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579314|1=Izuhayao Shrine (Ueda)}}''' - Situated in {{ill|Ueda, Nagano|en|Ueda, Nagano|qid=Q844852|lt=Ueda|1=Ueda, Nagano}}, it was historically referred to as Izube Shrine.
* '''{{ill|Izuhayao Shrine (Takamori)|ja|出早神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao Shrine (Takamori)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579315|1=Izuhayao Shrine (Takamori)}}''' - Found in {{ill|Takamori|ja|高森町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamori|1=Takamorimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q31469}}, it venerates the deity as a guardian of regional agriculture.
* '''{{ill|Minakami Shrine|lt=Minakami Shrine|lt=Kumano Izuhayao Shrine|ja|熊野出速雄神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Izuhayao Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 皆神神社}}''' - Located atop {{ill|Mount Minakami|lt=Mount Minakami|lt=Minakami-yama|ja|皆神山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minakami-yama|qq=}} in {{ill|Nagano (city)|en|Nagano (city)|qid=Q128849|lt=Nagano City|1=Nagano (city)}}, this site integrates elements of {{ill|Kumano shrines|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Kumano Three Shrines|qid=Q10403700}} worship.

*

== Shrines ==
{{multiple image
| align = right
| width = 200
| image1 = Suwa-taisha Kamisha Maemiya - Wakamiko-sha (若御子社).jpg
| caption1 = Wakamiko Shrine (Kamisha Maemiya)
| image2 = 間下十五社神社3_-_panoramio.jpg
| caption2 = Magashita Jūgōsha Shrine ({{ill|Okaya, Nagano|en|Okaya, Nagano|qid=Q838672|lt=Okaya|1=Okaya, Nagano}})
}}

Izuhaya no Mikoto is enshrined in numerous locations, including:
* {{ill|Suwa-taisha|en|Suwa-taisha|qid=Q218813|lt=Suwa-taisha|1=Suwa-taisha}} Kamisha Honmiya, Izuhaya Shrine (諏訪市)
* Izuhayaohagi Shrine (岡谷市)
* Kumano Izuhaya Shrine (長野市)

== See also ==
* {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|qid=Q9150391|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}
* {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|qid=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome no Kami|1=Yasakatome}}
* {{ill|Mishaguji|en|Mishaguji|qid=Q11071209|lt=Mishaguji|1=Mishaguji}}
* {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2370082}}


== See Also ==
* {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|qid=Q9150391|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}
* {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|qid=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome|1=Yasakatome}}
* {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|qid=Q11146526|lt=Moreya no Kami|1=Moreya}}
* {{ill|Tamaru-hime|ja|多満留姫|1=Tamaru-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}}
